name: mindrian-marketplace
description: MindrianOS - Your AI innovation co-founder. Stop thinking alone.

plugins.name: mindrian-os
plugins.description: 41 commands, 5 agents, auto-organizing Data Room, full meeting intelligence pipeline with cross-meeting convergence/contradiction detection, three-layer knowledge graph, team room with speaker profiles. Larry -- modeled on the inventor of PWS methodology -- thinks with you through venture innovation. Built on Simon's Architecture of Complexity.
